category_sources: Official grpc-swift-protobuf README describes SwiftProtobuf integrations for gRPC Swift.
source_facts.description says this is a protoc plugin for generating gRPC Swift stubs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables lists protoc-gen-grpc-swift-2 for this package.
docs_sources: Official Swift Package Index documentation linked by the grpc-swift-protobuf README.
Official gRPC Swift documentation is the language documentation surface.
Official grpc-swift-protobuf README is the source repository documentation entry point.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/grpc/grpc-swift-protobuf, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official grpc-swift-protobuf README says the repository contains integrations with SwiftProtobuf for gRPC Swift.
source_facts.description identifies a Swift gRPC stub generator plugin.
